drafts.subject: Update on Feature Launch
drafts.body:
Dear Sarah,

We are writing to inform you that the launch of our 'Dark Mode' feature has been delayed by 7 days due to a minor bug found during final testing. The new launch date is set for next Wednesday.

As a gesture of goodwill for the inconvenience caused, we would like to offer a 5% discount on next month's subscription. We apologize for any disruption this may have caused and appreciate your understanding in this matter.

Best regards, Alex

0fc945d6-e47c-4e5b-9211-01dc493939ff.title: Request for Emergency Budget Approval for Project Titan

drafts.subject: Request for Emergency Budget Approval for Project Titan
drafts.body:
Dear Sarah, 

I am writing to request approval for an emergency budget of $1,500 to cover extra hours for our freelance database engineer due to unforeseen delays in Project Titan. The third-party payment gateway API maintenance has pushed our Phase 2 launch date back to April 12th. 

Please let me know if this is feasible. I appreciate your prompt attention to this matter. 

Best regards, Alex

drafts.subject: Request for Emergency Budget Approval for Project Titan
drafts.body:
Dear Sarah, 

 I am writing to request approval for an emergency budget of $1,500 to cover extra hours for our freelance database engineer due to unforeseen delays in Project Titan. The third-party payment gateway API maintenance has pushed our Phase 2 launch date back to April 12th. 

 Key points to consider: 

 * The additional budget will ensure timely completion of the project 
 * The delay is due to unforeseen circumstances beyond our control 
 * The new launch date of April 12th is still achievable with the extra hours 

 Please let me know if this is feasible. I appreciate your prompt attention to this matter. 

 Best regards, Alex

drafts.subject: Request for Emergency Budget Approval for Project Titan
drafts.body:
Dear Sarah, 

 I am writing to request approval for an emergency budget of $1,500 to cover extra hours for our freelance database engineer due to unforeseen delays in Project Titan. The third-party payment gateway API maintenance has pushed our Phase 2 launch date back to April 12th. 

 Key points to consider: 

 * The additional budget will ensure timely completion of the project 
 * The delay is due to unforeseen circumstances beyond our control 
 * The new launch date of April 12th is still achievable with the extra hours 
 * The extra hours will be used to complete the remaining tasks, including testing and debugging 
 * The freelance database engineer has agreed to work the extra hours and has provided a detailed breakdown of the additional costs 
 * I have attached a revised project timeline and budget breakdown for your review 

 Please let me know if this is feasible. I appreciate your prompt attention to this matter. 

 Best regards, Alex
